Bases: AppConfig

default_auto_field = 'django.db.models.BigAutoField'¶
name = 'band'¶

band.models module¶

class band.models.BandMember(*args, **kwargs)¶

Bases: Model

A member of the band.

Fields:

name: Full name of the band member. role: Main role in the band (e.g., Vocals, Guitar, Drums). bio: Optional short biography or notes.

exception DoesNotExist¶

Bases: ObjectDoesNotExist

exception MultipleObjectsReturned¶

Bases: MultipleObjectsReturned

bio¶

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

id¶

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

name¶

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

objects = <django.db.models.manager.Manager object>¶
role¶

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

class band.models.Show(*args, **kwargs)¶

Bases: Model

A public performance by the band.

Fields:

title: Name of the show or event. venue: Venue where the show will take place. city: City of the venue. date: Calendar date of the performance. price: Ticket price (may be blank/NULL for free events). is_sold_out: Whether tickets are sold out.

exception DoesNotExist¶

Bases: ObjectDoesNotExist

exception MultipleObjectsReturned¶

Bases: MultipleObjectsReturned

city¶

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

date¶

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

get_next_by_date(*, field=<django.db.models.fields.DateField: date>, is_next=True, **kwargs)¶
get_previous_by_date(*, field=<django.db.models.fields.DateField: date>, is_next=False, **kwargs)¶
id¶

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

is_sold_out¶

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

objects = <django.db.models.manager.Manager object>¶

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

band.urls module¶

band.views module¶

class band.views.ShowList(**kwargs)¶

Bases: ListView

List all shows, ordered by date.

Template:

band/shows.html

Context:

shows (QuerySet[Show]): Shows ordered by date (ascending).

context_object_name = 'shows'¶
model¶

alias of Show

ordering = ['date']¶
paginate_by = 20¶
template_name = 'band/shows.html'¶
class band.views.SignUp(**kwargs)¶

Bases: CreateView

User signup view using Django’s built-in UserCreationForm.

form_class¶

alias of UserCreationForm

success_url = '/accounts/login/'¶
template_name = 'registration/signup.html'¶
band.views.about(request)¶

Render the About page with a list of band members.

Parameters:

request (HttpRequest) – The incoming HTTP request.

Returns:

Renders band/about.html with context:

  • members: all BandMember objects ordered by name.

Return type:

HttpResponse

band.views.home(request)¶

Render the home page with the next three upcoming shows.

Parameters:

request (HttpRequest) – The incoming HTTP request.

Returns:

Renders band/home.html with context:

  • upcoming: queryset of up to three future Show objects, ordered by date ascending.

Return type:

HttpResponse

minions_site
